blocks.en: Real spectrum is messy: a microwave, a neighbour's network, or a radar may occupy part of your wide channel. Wi-Fi 6 often had to abandon the whole channel and drop to a narrower one. Wi-Fi 7 is smarter.
blocks.zh: 真实频谱是杂乱的：微波炉、邻居的网络或雷达可能占用你宽信道的一部分。Wi-Fi 6 常常不得不放弃整个信道、退到更窄的信道。Wi-Fi 7 更聪明。

blocks.en: Preamble puncturing: blank out just the busy 20 MHz sub-channels and transmit on everything else. A 160 MHz channel with one 20 MHz piece punctured still carries 140 MHz — instead of collapsing to 80.
blocks.zh: 前导打孔：仅将忙碌的 20 MHz 子信道置空，在其余部分发送。一个 160 MHz 信道打掉一个 20 MHz 片后仍承载 140 MHz——而非塌缩到 80。

blocks.en: Click sub-channels above to puncture them and watch the usable width adjust. The leftover sub-channels are gathered into a Multiple Resource Unit (MRU) — a single user's allocation stitched together from non-adjacent pieces, which earlier Wi-Fi could not do.
blocks.zh: 点击上面的子信道进行打孔，观察可用带宽的变化。剩余的子信道被聚合成一个多资源单元（MRU）——把不相邻的片段拼成单一用户的分配，这是早期 Wi-Fi 做不到的。

blocks.en: Together, Multi-RU and puncturing mean a Wi-Fi 7 network degrades gracefully: interference costs you a slice, not the whole channel.
blocks.zh: Multi-RU 与打孔合在一起，意味着 Wi-Fi 7 网络能优雅降级：干扰只让你损失一小片，而非整个信道。

summary.zh: 标准中的 MRU 与打孔

blocks.en: EHT subcarrier allocation for multiple RUs is defined in 36.3.2.2, and preamble puncturing operation in 35.15.2 — with additional puncturing restrictions specified for EHT PPDUs.
blocks.zh: 用于多 RU 的 EHT 子载波分配定义于 36.3.2.2，前导打孔操作定义于 35.15.2——并为 EHT PPDU 规定了额外的打孔限制。

cites.note: multiple RU subcarrier allocation; preamble puncturing
